programme.title: The Way Back
programme.desc: The Way Back is the critically acclaimed new release from renowned director Peter Weir (Master and Commander, The Truman Show), starring Colin Farrell, Jim Sturgess, Ed Harris, Mark Strong and Saoirse Ronan.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Hopeless dweeb Elliot Richards is granted seven wishes by the Devil to snare Allison, the girl of his dreams, in exchange for his soul.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: يذهب داد لونغوورث وريا إلى بنك في المكسيك، ولكن داد يهرب بالنقود، تاركاً ريو ليقع في يد الروراليس. بعد خمس سنوات، يهرب ريو ويهدف إلى الانتقام من داد، لكن الأمور تتعقد عندما يقع في حب ابنة زوج داد.

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda harus menghentikan Tuan Kegelapan dari menghancurkan siang dan menikahi wanita yang dicintainya.

programme.title: Ronin
programme.desc: When an international team of former Cold War intelligence adversaries meet in a Warehouse, their venture of friendship, intrigue and betrayal has just begun.

programme.title: Stigmata
programme.desc: A priest from the Vatican is sent to visit a woman who's showing signs of stigmata. The priest comes to find that the lady is truly possessed by something.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot Richards is a hapless young man consumed by unrequited love, and desperate to change his life, he makes a deal with the devil who slyly promises to do just that — for a price.

programme.title: Homefront
programme.desc: A former DEA agent moves his family to a quiet town, where he soon tangles with a local meth druglord.

programme.title: Crank: High Voltage
programme.desc: In a chase through Los Angeles, Chev pursues a Chinese mobster who has stolen his nearly indestructible heart.

programme.title: Parker
programme.desc: A thief with a unique code of professional ethics is double-crossed by his crew and left for dead.

programme.title: Wild Card
programme.desc: When a Las Vegas bodyguard gets in trouble with the mob, he has one last play and it's all or nothing.

programme.title: A Christmas Dream
programme.desc: Headstrong New Yorker, Ashley, reluctantly agrees to spend Christmas in Italy with her mother in an effort to sell her grandparents' ranch. However, over time she finds herself growing attached to the beautiful countryside, and upon meeting one of the potential investors, realises that love and legacy could bring the old family home together again.

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date
programme.desc: It's Christmas in the charming city of York, and after the death of her mother, teenager Jules knows all she and her dad, David, really need for Christmas is love. With both struggling to cope with everyday life in the shadow of their loss, Jules, inspired by happy memories of her mum, decides to take matters into her own hands. Creating profiles for David on multiple online dating platforms without his knowledge, Jules sets out to find her dad a girlfriend and, for herself, someone with whom she can talk. But finding love is easier said than done as Jules discovers, when her plans begin to unravel with hilarious and unexpected consequences. A uniquely heartfelt festive rom-com, starring Jermey Piven (Serendipity, Entourage) and Joely Richardson (101 Dalmatians, The Patriot).

programme.title: The Claus Family
programme.desc: After discovering his grandfather is Santa Claus, Jules has to help him deliver his presents all around the world. But Jules' hatred for Christmas might make that more difficult than Santa thought.

programme.title: Benji's Very Own Christmas Story
programme.desc: On a surprise visit to meet Kris Kringle, Benji and his friends are shocked to discover that he plans to take the night off on Christmas Eve!

programme.title: Saving Santa
programme.desc: Once upon a time, Santa operated with just a small workshop and a few elves. But, as Christmas has grown ever bigger, Santa has been forced to innovate! Now his cleverest elves develop amazing technology, including a hologram to hide the North Pole and a time machine to allow Santa to deliver presents to every home in the world, in just the one night. Bernard is an elf who dreams of creating such inventions, but his job is to clean the reindeer stables! Yet when he creates an amazing Christmas memory machine, his luck might be changing. But Bernard's invention is broken by a curious elf, causing the North Pole's power to fail and the hologram hiding it to disappear. Now exposed to the outside world, it is spotted by Santa's enemy, Neville Baddington, who is determined to steal Santa's secrets for himself. The only person who can stop him is Bernard.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In London
programme.desc: The epic rise and fall of a nationwide criminal empire that lasted for three decades and paved the way for the notorious Kray twins to exert their dominance over the capital.

programme.title: Mara
programme.desc: A twisted, spine-tingling horror based on the ancient legend of the night hag demon - Mara. Criminal psychologist Kate (Olga Kurylenko: Quantum of Solace) is assigned to the murder of a man who has seemingly been strangled in his sleep by his wife and the only witness is their daughter. As Kate investigates she experiences the same petrifying symptoms and spirals through a chilling nightmare.

programme.title: Escape Room
programme.desc: A mind-bending psychological thriller about a group of friends who find themselves in a sadistic, living nightmare. Six adventurous strangers travel to a mysterious building to experience a game where players compete to solve puzzles to win money. But what starts out as innocent fun soon turns into a suffocating and terrifying game of hell.

programme.title: Xmoor
programme.desc: When the hunters become the hunted. In a bid to catch sight of a mysterious killer beast, documentary-makers Georgia and Matt, along with animal expert Fox, head out onto the dark terrain of Exmoor. But when they encounter a series of corpses, they know they are caught in the clutches of something much worse. This hair-raising creature feature, brings a sinister twist to the table.

programme.title: Mythica: The Dragon Slayer
programme.desc: The end is here. Join sorceress Marek in the spectacular and gripping finale of the legendary Mythica journey. With a new evil to defeat, Marek embarks on an arduous quest to gain a valuable weapon from the Gods. From battling the Lich King's evil zombie legions to joining forces with her sworn enemy, will Marek save the Gods, the world and herself in time?

programme.title: Calling for Love
programme.desc: Love cynic podcaster Sam fills in as host for 'Love Beats'. During the show, she takes a call from Jake, who is in search of the one. By following Jake's journey, can Sam find her true love? (2020)

programme.title: The Best Version of Love
programme.desc: Image consultant Rebecca must clean up an arrogant ex-soccer players image. Will Rebecca be able to raise to the challenge to help Clive become the best version of himself? (2022)

programme.title: Fashionably In Love
programme.desc: New York playboy Oliver needs to clear up his image by dating Avery a respectable socialite. Will this unluckily pairing turn into anything more? (2022)

programme.title: Inspiring Love
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding shy artist Isla and confident salesman Mark team up to create a sculpture for Mark's his boss. As Isla spends more time with Mark, will his confidence rub off? (2022)

programme.title: A Case Of You
programme.desc: A young writer (Justin Long) woos a cute and quirky barista (Evan Rachel Wood) by studying her Facebook profile and making himself into the man of her dreams. When she falls for his alter ego, he must keep up the act or risk losing her.

programme.title: Love & Other Drugs
programme.desc: A womanizing Viagra salesman with no sense of direction or responsibility falls in love with a free-spirited woman.

programme.title: Can You Keep A Secret?
programme.desc: On a return flight from a botched client meeting, Emma reveals all of her deepest secrets to a handsome stranger when her plane hits turbulence and she believes she is going to die. Emma thinks she will never see the guy again.

programme.title: Rekindling Christmas
programme.desc: Drafted by the NFL Jesse left his college sweetheart behind. Now, years later, he's back with only one goal, to win Annika back.

programme.title: Christmas For Three
programme.desc: When a successful bachelor suddenly finds himself as the guardian of a 10 year old boy, he leans on the smart and beautiful social worker for help, only to fall in love with the woman who turned his life upside down.

programme.title: Mr Morgans Last Love
programme.desc: He's a widower in Paris who speaks no French. She's a dance instructor less than half his age. Can they become a family, or will his estranged adult children halt the friendship?

programme.title: You Can't Fight Christmas
programme.desc: Interior designer Leslie Major loves all things Christmas. When she meets handsome Edmund James, she quickly learns he thinks the festivities are frivolous and superficial.

programme.title: Under the Mistletoe
programme.desc: Starring Jaime Ray Newman, Michael Shanks, and Conan Graham. At Christmas, the tables turn on a selfless single mom when a local radio station takes over her love life after an innocent call from her 8-year-old son.

programme.title: Passport to Love
programme.desc: Nicole, a successful travel blogger, meets Kade, a marketing rep for a travel publishing company, and they form the beginnings of a relationship while exploring an island destination. They juggle their work traveling around the world while seeing each other again. Both know there's something special between them, but it will be put to the test when Kade's competitive boss challenges Kade to thwart Nicole's business.

programme.title: Miracle Maker
programme.desc: “The Miracle Maker is coming!” If any town is in need of a miracle, it's Woodhaven, a tiny town hanging on the edge of the American frontier. It's nearly Christmas, but it's hardly a season of celebration. Work is scarce, money is tight, love is lagging, and spirits are down. Maybe the Miracle Maker can turn things around. The town anxiously waits for someone magnificent who can change their lives. But the ragged traveler who appears isn't what anyone expects—except for one small silent boy and a precocious little girl. It seems this man can barely take care of himself, let alone fulfill the dreams of others. But miracles can come in all shapes and sizes—and sometimes from unexpected places. Your entire family will love this Christmas tale of hope, love, and miracles.

programme.title: Calling For Love
programme.desc: Podcaster Sam Sanders is assigned to host a show that reunites lost loves. Even though Love is the last thing on her mind, Samantha falls for charming Jake who calls in with a problem. Will Samantha follow her heart this time?

programme.title: Bookworm and the Beast
programme.desc: Izzy is ready to make a difference in the world as she starts her career in public relations. When Grant Beiste - the big-headed corporate celebrity in town - accidentally hits her father with a car, Izzy is thrown into a public scandal that forces her to work closely with Grant. As she fights to save both her father and Grant's public image, she falls in love and learns not to judge a book by it's cover.

programme.title: Becoming Santa
programme.desc: Holly decides to introduce her boyfriend Connor to her family up north.

programme.title: A Gift Wrapped Christmas
programme.desc: Personal shopper Gwen's new client Charlie is a workaholic.

programme.title: Four Christmases and a Wedding
programme.desc: Chloe (Arielle Kebbel) is hired to plan the local Christmas Festival.

programme.title: A Family for the Holidays
programme.desc: Becky decides invite Grace to join her family for Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Becoming Santa
programme.desc: Holly decides to introduce her boyfriend Connor to her family up north.

programme.title: Be Mine
programme.desc: A woman finds romance as she prepares to take over her mother's garden store.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: A were-cat seeking revenge against the hunter that murdered her brother plays a cat and mouse game with Mike.

programme.title: All of My heart 2
programme.desc: Brian and Jenny are preparing for the big opening of their bed and breakfast, Emily's Country Inn, when a huge storm hits Bucks County. Brian agrees to return to Wall Street to boost their funds, while Jenny scrambles to keep the opening on time.

programme.title: Kidnapped to the Island
programme.desc: When a teen aspiring to be a pop star disappears, her mom tracks her down, uncovering a sinister plot.

programme.title: Killer Reputation
programme.desc: A PR maven takes pride in her reputation, but she risks it to help a star accused of killing his ex-wife.

programme.title: It's Christmas, Eve
programme.desc: Eve Morgan is in a tough spot when she is assigned to shut down a school's failing music program.

programme.title: Adam Sandler's Eight Crazy Nights
programme.desc: Adam Sandler invites you to share some holiday cheer in this no-holds-barred musical animated comedy. Davey Stone finds himself in trouble with the law and is sentenced to community service as the assistant referee for the youth basketball league. Davey thinks he's gotten off easy until he meets Whitey Duball, the eccentric, elf-like head referee. The mismatch between Whitey's good heart and never-ending optimism and Davey's constant trouble-making antics soon has them both wondering if going to jail wouldn't have been easier. Adam Sandler voiced the three lead characters of Whitey, Davey and Whitey's fraternal twin sister, Eleanore.

programme.title: As Good As It Gets
programme.desc: The Academy Award-winning (best actor Jack Nicholson, best actress Helen Hunt) offbeat comedy celebrates the unique bond between three very different characters. Also stars Greg Kinnear.

programme.title: Bewitched (2005)
programme.desc: Oscar-winner Nicole Kidman and wickedly funny Will Ferrell star as actors playing Darrin and Samantha on a remake of the television show "Bewitched" in this cleverly crafty comedy from director NoraEphron.

programme.title: Eat Pray Love
programme.desc: At a crossroads in her life, Liz Gilbert (Julia Roberts) travels to Italy, India and Bali to discover meaning and happiness in this inspiring true story, based on the best-selling book.

programme.title: Bastard, Go and Kill
programme.desc: Chaco, a Mexican on the run from just about everyone, is framed for the killing of a couple of cattlemen.

programme.title: Outlaw Women
programme.desc: A young doctor is forced by a female outlaw to a town run entirely by women, where men are only allowed to work in or visit the crooked gambling hall. As the town's independence is threatened by notorious outlaws and a new marshal's election, where women have no say, tensions rise, and the doctor becomes entangled in the town's fate.

programme.title: Alien Thunder
programme.desc: Based on an actual event, this is the tragic story of Saskatchewan fugitive Almighty Voice (Gordon Tootoosis), a Cree Indian who is arrested for stealing government livestock out of desperate hunger.

programme.title: The Last Traitor
programme.desc: Ned Carter is waiting with a bunch of guests for his bride. When they notice there are exactly 13 people at the table, an unlucky number, some think it's an evil omen.

programme.title: Buffalo Bill in Tomahawk Territory

programme.title: The Ghost Goes West
programme.desc: Robert Donat plays two roles in this celebrated comedy.

programme.desc: When the last will and testament of wealthy, notorious practical joker Henry Augustus Russell is read to his only surviving relatives, it is found that he had remained faithful to his reputation until his last hours. Each of his four relatives will receive a fortune, provided they perform required hilarious, embarrassing or criminal acts.

programme.title: Where There's a Will
programme.desc: Benjamin Stubbins is a penniless lawyer who has spent most of his money on drink. When he accidentally interrupts a robbery at work, he becomes the target of a gang of thieves who determine that although he is impoverished, his relatives aren't.

programme.title: Cart

programme.desc: Josh is forced to keep his disturbed sister hidden in an underground bunker in order to keep her supernatural powers hidden from the outside world. When she becomes sick, a scientist is hired to help her, but this ultimately leads to the discovery of her amazing superpowers.

programme.desc: Spence Cutler never felt empathy or guilt.
